title: 🎮 Minecraft Real World Photos With AI
prompt:
🎮 Prompt 1 — Minecraft Explorer
Transform the uploaded photo into an ultra-realistic Minecraft world.
Keep the exact person from the reference image, same pose, same camera angle, same clothing, same body proportions, same perspective and composition.
Replace the environment with a breathtaking Minecraft landscape featuring blocky mountains, pixelated trees, rivers, villages, caves, grass blocks and realistic Minecraft terrain.
Photorealistic character integrated naturally inside the Minecraft world, cinematic sunlight, volumetric lighting, ray tracing, realistic shadows, depth of field, ultra detailed textures, realistic skin tones, Unreal Engine quality, adventure atmosphere.
The subject should look like they have physically entered Minecraft.
Vertical portrait, highly detailed, 8K quality.
🏞️ Prompt 2 — Minecraft Mountain View
Using the uploaded image as reference, recreate the exact pose and framing.
Place the person at the edge of a massive Minecraft mountain overlooking a beautiful Minecraft valley with villages, rivers, forests, waterfalls and distant snowy peaks.
Keep clothing identical to reference.
Ultra realistic Minecraft environment, ray-traced lighting, cinematic golden hour, realistic atmospheric perspective, volumetric fog, realistic reflections, photorealistic human subject, Minecraft blocks rendered with extreme realism.
Adventure photography style.
8K masterpiece.
🌊 Prompt 3 — Minecraft Waterfall Scene
Transform the uploaded photo into a realistic Minecraft waterfall environment.
Keep the exact person, pose, expression, camera perspective and clothing from the reference image.
Replace surroundings with giant Minecraft cliffs, flowing block waterfalls, lush Minecraft forest, flowers, caves and realistic water reflections.
Photorealistic human integrated naturally into the Minecraft world, cinematic sunlight, ray tracing, global illumination, highly detailed textures, realistic shadows, depth of field.
Ultra realistic Minecraft photography.
🛶 Prompt 4 — Minecraft Lake Adventure
Recreate the uploaded image inside a realistic Minecraft lake biome.
Keep the exact subject and pose from the reference image.
Surround the person with crystal-clear Minecraft water, wooden cabins, waterfalls, mountains, forests and Minecraft wildlife.
Realistic water reflections, cinematic lighting, ray tracing, Unreal Engine rendering, ultra detailed textures, photorealistic character.
The final image should look like a real person visiting Minecraft in real life.
🔥 Prompt 5 — Minecraft Camping
Transform the uploaded photo into a cozy Minecraft campsite scene.
Keep the exact subject, pose, outfit and composition from the reference image.
Add a Minecraft campfire, lanterns, cooking pot, wooden chests, forest biome, lake reflections and warm sunset lighting.
Photorealistic human subject inside a realistic Minecraft world, cinematic atmosphere, realistic fire glow, ray tracing, detailed textures, Unreal Engine quality, depth of field.
8K cinematic photography.
👥 Prompt 6 — Minecraft Couple Adventure
Transform the uploaded reference image into a realistic Minecraft fantasy world.
Keep all people exactly the same as the original photo.
Maintain identical poses, expressions, clothing, body proportions, camera angle and composition.
Create a beautiful Minecraft kingdom with castles, bridges, villages, mountains, rivers and forests.
Photorealistic humans naturally integrated into Minecraft, cinematic sunlight, ray tracing, realistic shadows, global illumination, highly detailed environment, adventure atmosphere.
Ultra realistic Minecraft travel photography.
✨ Secret Prompt Modifier
Add this at the end of any prompt:
Keep the uploaded image composition 100% identical. Preserve pose, framing, body position, clothing, camera perspective and subject identity. Only transform the world around them into a hyper-realistic Minecraft universe. Real person + realistic Minecraft environment blend.
This is the key line that makes the AI preserve the original photo while converting it into the Minecraft world style.

title: Korean Cherry Blossom Portrait
prompt: A high-end editorial portrait of an elegant adult Korean woman standing beneath blooming cherry blossom branches in a traditional Korean garden. She wears a refined ivory hanbok-inspired dress with delicate embroidered details, styled with a graceful updo and understated jewelry. Frame her in a vertical 4:5 waist-up composition, centered with soft negative space and a shallow depth of field. Use diffused early-morning light, luminous natural skin tones, realistic skin texture, gentle highlights, and a quiet sophisticated mood. The background includes a pale stone path, muted sage foliage, traditional architecture, and abundant blush-pink blossoms rendered as creamy bokeh. Photorealistic, cinematic, premium fashion photography, 85mm lens look, no text, no logo, no watermark, accurate anatomy.
